---
title: "Pre-Workshop Preparation"
---

Participants are expected to have some experience with decision modeling and/or basic concepts of economic evaluation. Self-paced modules introducing R concepts specifically for decision modeling are provided as part of the workshop.

Please complete the **Intro to R for Decision Modeling** modules on your own by **June 25, 2026**.

## Estimated time

- Participants familiar with R: **2-3 hours**
- Participants new to R or returning after a break: **6-8 hours**

## Modules

1. [Intro to R for Decision Modeling](intro-r.qmd)
2. [Setup Check](setup-check.qmd)
3. [Preparation Exercises](preparation-exercises.qmd)
4. [June 25 Video Lectures](video-lectures-june25.qmd)
5. [June 26 Video Lectures](video-lectures-june26.qmd)
6. [June 27 Video Lectures](video-lectures-june27.qmd)
7. [Readings](readings.qmd)
